---
title: "Knowledge Base"
---

## [Enter the Knowledge Base!](https://charliehomewood.github.io/knowledge-base/)

With this knowledge base, I want to document concepts in data science which I feel are important to graple with and gain an understanding of.

I feel making public resources on such concepts will enable me to further develop my own understanding, and hopefully provide value to others who are as keen to learn as I am!

I'm hosting an Obsidian vault, via Quartz and GitHub Pages, which contains individual notes on data science concepts. Think of it as a data science wikipedia, based on my own experience and understanding.

If you do find something from this knowledge base to be useful, do let me know!
